mapper.insert: INSERT INTO temp_subset (name, description, creator_id, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{creatorId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM temp_subset ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE temp_subset SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM temp_subset_game WHERE subset_id = #{subsetId} ORDER BY name
mapper.update: UPDATE temp_subset_game SET name = #{name}, `desc` = #{desc}, translated_name = #{translatedName}, translated_desc = #{translatedDesc}, image = #{image}, video = #{video}, marquee = #{marquee}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, manual = #{manual}, rating = #{rating}, releasedate = #{releasedate}, developer = #{developer}, publisher = #{publisher}, genre = #{genre}, players = #{players}, crc32 = #{crc32}, lang = #{lang}, game_id = #{gameId}, source = #{source}, path = #{path}, genreid = #{genreid}, sort_by = #{sortBy}, platform_id = #{platformId}, platform_path = #{platformPath}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
